summary: Major refactoring session: facade pattern for all LiveViews (audit/rules/agents), Giulia integration at port 4020, audit fixer pipeline for specs/moduledocs/pipes/atoms, rule dedup with god rules (88 duplicates consolidated into 25), superseded_by relationship, HeexCalls module for dead code filtering. Rules page layout needs CSS fix (page-header, filter-chips). 71 proposed rules remain for curation.
